title: Rushikonda Beach
tagline: Rushikonda Beach — beach town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Rushikonda Beach is situated in Visakhapatnam on the shore of the Bay of Bengal in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Rushikonda Beach is situated in Visakhapatnam on the shore of the Bay of Bengal in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The beach is maintained by the Andhra Pradesh Tourism Development Corporation (APTDC).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Beach Road, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: Beach Road, also known as Dr. NTR Beach Road, is a major roadway in Visakhapatnam.

topPlaces.name: Rushikonda
topPlaces.description: Rushikonda is a neighbourhood situated on Visakhapatnam and Bheemili road. Visakhapatnam Metropolitan Region Development Authority undertakes the development activities related to infrastructure and tourism.

topPlaces.name: Yendada
topPlaces.description: Yendada is a neighbourhood situated on Visakhapatnam and Madhurawada road.

topPlaces.name: Fintech Valley Vizag
topPlaces.description: Fintech Valley Vizag is an initiative of the Government of Andhra Pradesh to promote business infrastructure in the state, and attract investors and multinational corporations to set up offices. Fintech Valley was founded by N. Chandrababu Naidu then Chief Minister of the Andhra Pradesh state in December 2016 with the goal of enhancing Visakhapatnam City as a financial technology capital in Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Millennium IT Towers
topPlaces.description: Millennium IT Towers is an information technology (IT) park situated in the city of Visakhapatnam, India. It was set up for the growth of information technology and as an initiative in making Visakhapatnam city as a Financial-tech (Fintech) Capital in the state of Andhra Pradesh by the APIIC and Government of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Sagar Nagar
topPlaces.description: Sagar Nagar is a neighborhood of the city of Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India, on the coast of the Bay of Bengal. In 2025, there were plans to develop Sagar Nagar beach.

topPlaces.name: Thimmapuram, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: Thimmapuram is a suburb in the city of Visakhapatnam, state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It's in the northern part of the city.

topPlaces.name: ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium
topPlaces.description: ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium (stands for Andhra Cricket Association–Visakhapatnam District Cricket Association Cricket Stadium) is a multi-purpose stadium in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is primarily used for international cricket matches.

items.note: Beach Road, also known as Dr. NTR Beach Road, is a major roadway in Visakhapatnam.

Rushikonda is a neighbourhood situated on Visakhapatnam and Bheemili road. Visakhapatnam Metropolitan Region Development Authority undertakes the development activities related to infrastructure and tourism.
Yendada is a neighbourhood situated on Visakhapatnam and Madhurawada road.

Fintech Valley Vizag is an initiative of the Government of Andhra Pradesh to promote business infrastructure in the state, and attract investors and multinational corporations to set up offices. Fintech Valley was founded by N. Chandrababu Naidu then Chief Minister of the Andhra Pradesh state in December 2016 with the goal of enhancing Visakhapatnam City as a financial technology capital in Andhra Pradesh.

Millennium IT Towers is an information technology (IT) park situated in the city of Visakhapatnam, India. It was set up for the growth of information technology and as an initiative in making Visakhapatnam city as a Financial-tech (Fintech) Capital in the state of Andhra Pradesh by the APIIC and Government of Andhra Pradesh.
Sagar Nagar is a neighborhood of the city of Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India, on the coast of the Bay of Bengal. In 2025, there were plans to develop Sagar Nagar beach.
Thimmapuram is a suburb in the city of Visakhapatnam, state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It's in the northern part of the city.

ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium (stands for Andhra Cricket Association–Visakhapatnam District Cricket Association Cricket Stadium) is a multi-purpose stadium in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is primarily used for international cricket matches.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rushikonda Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rushikonda Beach is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rushikonda Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rushikonda Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rushikonda Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rushikonda Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Rushikonda Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rushikonda Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Beach Road, Visakhapatnam, Rushikonda, Yendada, Fintech Valley Vizag, Millennium IT Towers.
